query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as grupos_duplicados,
  SUM(qty) as total_registros_duplicados
FROM (
  SELECT address, addressNumber, COUNT(*) as qty
  FROM establishments 
  WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
    AND addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != ''
  GROUP BY address, addressNumber 
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) sub;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as grupos_duplicados,
  SUM(qty) as total_registros_duplicados
FROM (
  SELECT address, addressNumber, COUNT(*) as qty
  FROM establishments 
  WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
    AND addressNumber IS NOT NULL AND addressNumber != ''
  GROUP BY address, addressNumber 
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) sub;
